title: Communauté de communes du Pays de Tronçais
summary: The communauté de communes du Pays de Tronçais is a communauté de communes, located in the Allier department of the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region of France. Created in 1999, its seat is in Cérilly. Its area is 495.6 km2, and its population was 7,469 in 2020.
text:
The communauté de communes du Pays de Tronçais is a communauté de communes, located in the Allier department of the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region of France. Created in 1999, its seat is in Cérilly. Its area is 495.6 km2, and its population was 7,469 in 2020.
